Lisa Ritmore
Property Manager

Welcome to Chaska Commons Coworking! Explore our modern shared office space in historic downtown Chaska. Choose from private offices, shared offices, dedicated desks, or flexible lounge passes, and enjoy gig-speed internet, conference rooms, a kitchen, patio, and coffee bar. We're open daily 6:00 AM – 8:00 PM.

Call +1 (952) 215-8455 Text +1 (952) 215-8455 info@chaskacommons.com
